description: Bare HTTP GET requests consistently return a 200 OK status but the response body contains a captcha/verification challenge instead of the expected profile data or embedded JSON state. Reproduction: curl -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" https://www.tiktok.com/@tiktok
mitigation: Migrated TikTok to PlaywrightCrawler to natively solve/bypass SSR Captcha blocks by rendering the page.

description: Bare HTTP requests and Apify residential proxies both fail to hit SSR HTML containing SIGI_STATE or __UNIVERSAL_DATA_FOR_REHYDRATION__. The response contains a captcha challenge. Cheerio extraction yields 0% success.
mitigation: Migrated TikTok to PlaywrightCrawler to natively solve/bypass SSR Captcha blocks by rendering the page.
evidence: Out.log from HARDEN phase execution showing 16 validation failures
